title: Testing Environment Setup Examples
text: Testing Environment Setup Examples The following examples are for testing purpose only. To apply these settings in production, follow the backend-specific instructions. Starting Grafana LGTM Stack Grafana's otel-lgtm is an all-in-one OpenTelemetry backend. To start it with docker, run the following command: Explain this code docker run -p 3000:3000 -p 4317:4317 -p 4318:4318 --rm -ti grafana/otel-lgtm Copy To access OTLP HTTP Endpoint, go to http://localhost:4318 . To access Grafana, go to http://localhost:3000 and configure dashboards. Custom Collector + Jaeger + Elasticsearch Example OpenTelemetry Collector Config Example (otel-collector-config.yaml): Explain this code receivers: otlp: protocols: http: endpoint: 0.0.0.0:4318 processors: batch: {} exporters: otlp: endpoint: jaeger_host:4318 tls: insecure: true elasticsearch/http: endpoint: "http://elasticsearch_host:9200" logs_index: "Uniface_App-log" service: pipelines: traces: receivers: [otlp] exporters: [otlp] logs: receivers: [otlp] processors: [batch] exporters: [elasticsearch/http] Copy Start Elasticsearch (Persistent Log Storage) Explain this code docker run -d --name elasticsearch -e "discovery.type=single-node" -e "xpack.security.enabled=false" -p 9200:9200 docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.17.5 Copy Start Jaeger (Trace Viewer) Explain this code docker run -d --name jaeger -e COLLECTOR_OTLP_ENABLED=true -p 16686:16686 \ # Jaeger UI -p 4317:4317 \ # OTLP gRPC -p 4318:4318 \ # OTLP HTTP jaegertracing/all-in-one:1.50 Copy Start Kibana Explain this code docker run -d --name kibana --link elasticsearch:elasticsearch -p 5601:5601 -e "ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200" docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.17.5 Copy Start the OpenTelemetry Collector Explain this code docker run --rm -it --name otel-collector -v $(pwd)/otel-collector-config.yaml:/etc/otel-collector-config.yaml -p 4318:4318 otel/opentelemetry-collector-contrib:latest --config=/etc/otel-collector-config.yaml Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
